output.fixVerified: FooterInfoSocialItem rewrite — Link component, deferred IconPicker, block.json defaults

build.detail: taktician_validate_all passed with 0 errors. 9 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive×2, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero×2, Tabs) — none in any Footer block file. Sync: 1 known false-positive warning (FooterInfo.tsx InspectorControls root vs PHP section — editor-only wrapper, not a frontend issue). Registration: 0 issues across all Footer child blocks.

linkComponent.detail: Link imported from @taktdev/components (line 2) and used as the wrapping element (lines 76–113). No import or usage of __experimentalLinkControl, Popover for link editing, ToggleControl, or TextControl anywhere in the file.

deferredIconPicker.detail: isSelected is declared in EditProps (line 53) and destructured (line 56). The JSX uses a ternary on isSelected (line 89): when true, renders <IconPicker> (full MediaUpload-capable picker); when false, renders a lightweight static fallback — either the matching SVG from suggestedIcons or a placeholder span. This prevents MediaUpload store interactions during block insertion lifecycle.

forbiddenImports.detail: Grep confirms none of the following are imported or used: __experimentalLinkControl, Popover (for link editing), ToggleControl, TextControl.

renameBlockIntegration.detail: renameBlock called inside Link onChange (line 85) to keep the block label in sync with the link title — correct pattern.

logoId.detail: logoId defined as { "type": "number", "default": null } — explicit null default present.

iconSlug.detail: iconSlug defined as { "type": "string", "default": "" } — explicit empty string default present.

linkDefault.detail: link object has full default including opensInNewTab: true and all required fields.

tsxPhpSync.detail: PHP template unchanged and correctly in sync with TSX output. Key structural verification: (1) PHP skips render entirely when linkUrl is empty — matches TSX which only renders via Link when a URL is set. (2) Icon resolution logic mirrors TSX: iconSlug takes priority over logoId, falls back gracefully. (3) <li> wrapper with theme_block_props('block list-none') matches TSX useBlockProps({ className: 'block list-none' }). (4) <a> element classes match TSX Link className exactly: block transition-colors w-6 h-6 no-underline! *:w-6 *:h-6 *:object-contain *:object-center text-white hover:text-accent. (5) <span class="sr-only"> for screen-reader title is present — not in TSX editor view (editor uses Link's own label UI) but correct for frontend accessibility. (6) phpcs:ignore comment for SVG echo is appropriate.

syncNotes.srOnlySpan: PHP renders {linkTitle} inside the anchor. TSX editor does not render this directly — it is a frontend-only accessibility addition. This is acceptable and intentional; the editor shows icon + Link UI, the frontend shows icon + screen-reader span.
syncNotes.hasIconClass: TSX conditionally adds *:w-6 *:h-6 *:object-contain *:object-center to Link className when hasIcon is true. PHP always includes these classes on the <a>. Difference is negligible: when no icon is present the classes have no visual effect, and PHP has no img/SVG child to constrain. Not a defect.

renderedOutput.detail: Page audit of https://ign.localhost/test-footer/ confirms all 7 footer sections render correctly.

socialLinksPerSection.assessment: PASS — social link counts match block structure from taktician_wp_count_blocks. Sections without social items correctly show 0.

srOnlySpans.assessment: PASS — every social link anchor has a .sr-only span providing an accessible name for screen readers.

logoAnchor.assessment: PASS — FQA-001 fix still intact. Logo anchor present only in sections with a logoId set, absent from all others.

results.noEmptyAnchors: PASS — all social link anchors have accessible text via sr-only span and/or aria-label.

passedChecks: Build passes with 0 errors in all Footer block files
Link component from @taktdev/components used — no __experimentalLinkControl, Popover, ToggleControl, or TextControl
IconPicker conditionally rendered only when isSelected is true
Static icon fallback renders correct SVG (from suggestedIcons) or placeholder span when not selected
block.json has explicit defaults: logoId null, iconSlug empty string
PHP template unchanged and structurally in sync with TSX frontend output
All 7 footer sections render correctly with correct social link counts per section
Every social link anchor has .sr-only span for screen-reader accessibility
FQA-001 (empty logo anchor) fix still intact across all sections
No new issues introduced by the rewrite
